query: Netflix documentary BTS: The Return release date 2026

{"query":"Netflix documentary BTS: The Return release date 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1928,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"The trailer for BTS: The Return was released on March 16, 2026. A week after Arirang released, and nearly a week after the group's comeback concert, titled BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang, exclusively streamed on Netflix, the documentary was released on Netflix as scheduled, on March 27, 2026."},"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/BTS:_The_Return#:~:text=The%20trailer%20for%20BTS%3A%20The,%2C%20on%20March%2027%2C%202026.","title":"BTS: The Return - Wikipedia","content":"BTS: The Return is a 2026 documentary film directed by Bao Nguyen, featuring South Korean boy band BTS.
After completing South Korea's mandatory military service, BTS reunites in Los Angeles to record their fifth album, Arirang, as well as prepare for their comeback performance at Gwanghwamun Square in Seoul.
On March 7, Billboard announced several release dates from BTS to accompany the release of Arirang, which was March 20, 2026, stating: "A concert film titled The Comeback Live is scheduled to debut on March 21, offering fans a performance-focused companion to the new era.
A documentary, The Return, will follow shortly after, with the film set to begin streaming on Netflix on March 27.""},{"url":"https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609","title":"Watch BTS: THE RETURN | Netflix Official Site","content":"BTS gathers in LA to record their album "ARIRANG" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era."},{"url":"https://www.tvguide.com/news/bts-netflix-documentary-the-return-premiere-date-trailer-behind-the-scenes/","title":"BTS Netflix Documentary: Everything to Know About BTS: The Return Premiere Date, Trailer, and Behind the Scenes - TV Guide","content":"BTS's comeback at Seoul's historic Gwanghwamun Square may have been streamed to millions around the world, but that was just the beginning of the K-pop juggernaut's partnership with Netflix.
Directed by Bao Nguyen— best known for The Stringer and The Greatest Night in Pop— BTS: The Return follows RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V, and Jung-kook in their long-awaited reunion after completing military service.
The documentary's release comes just one week after the group dropped their latest album, Arirang, on March 20.
Netflix released the trailer for BTS: The Return on March 16.
His experience working on his first documentary, Live from New York!, about Saturday Night Live, provided insights."},{"url":"https://m.economictimes.com/news/international/us/bts-documentary-bts-the-return-release-time-on-netflix-when-can-fans-start-streaming/articleshow/129821422.cms","title":"BTS documentary release date: BTS Documentary ‘BTS: The Return’ release time on Netflix: When can fans start streaming? - The Economic Times","content":"BTS Documentary: Directed by Bao Nguyen, known for works such as The Stringer and The Greatest Night in Pop, the documentary provides a close, behind-the-scenes portrait of BTS as they come together again and reshape their artistic identity.
Netflix has confirmed that BTS: The Return will premiere globally on Friday, March 27, 2026, as per a report by Decider.
Unlike concert films or special screenings, the documentary will not be released in theatres and will be available exclusively on the streaming platform.
This means fans in India can begin streaming BTS: The Return from Friday afternoon, making it a daytime premiere for the region.
All seven members, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, RM, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook, feature prominently, documenting their reunion in Los Angeles and the creative process behind their fifth studio album, ARIRANG.
(Catch all the US News, UK News, Canada News, International Breaking News Events, and Latest News Updates on The Economic Times.)"}]}

BTS: THE RETURN, a Netflix Documentary. Follow the long-awaited comeback of pop royalty, BTS. Get unprecedented access to the seven members’ journey of doubt, laughter, and rediscovery as they return to the studio, create new music, and begin the comeback of the decade! From acclaimed director Bao Nguyen (The Stringer, The Greatest Night in Pop) and producers This Machine (Martha, Karol G) and HYBE.

BTS: The Return - Only on Netflix, March 27

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609
